contract_summary: This functions as a get-wrapper for struct amdgpu_bo: it increments the underlying drm_gem_object's reference count via drm_gem_object_get. It returns the same bo pointer with an additional reference acquired. The caller must eventually call amdgpu_bo_unref (or the appropriate put function) to release the reference. The function gracefully handles NULL input by returning NULL without taking any reference.
